api_key.description: EmailOctopus API key, sent as the api_key query parameter on every request. Never logged.

base_url.description: EmailOctopus API base URL. Defaults to the production endpoint; override for test proxies.

list_id.description: EmailOctopus list ID to read contacts from; required only for the list_contacts stream, substituted into /lists/<list_id>/contacts.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
